productDisplayName: Guess Women Sparkle Box Set Watch With Interchangeable Straps
description: guess watches are all about durability and masterpieces rolled in one. They have proven themselves by epitomizing style and impeccable technology in the art of creating high quality timepieces. The new range of watches are a fresh take on their eye for perfection and are great for urban wear. Case diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel, crystal embellishments and a white coloured leather strap Set of two extra leather straps in pink and black guess logo at the 12 hour mark Tang clasp with a silver dial and metallic numbers in metallic handsPolished hands mark sub dials Screw to reset time, alarm and set the timer Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters,allowing you to use it when washing hands or in mild rain
